title: Reverse Engineering Philco PH32B51DSGWVB SMART TV
snippet: IPTV on Old TV?The goal here was to install SS-IPTV for my grandpa, so he could watch TV on his own to get a little less bored on this pandemic. This app allows you to watch IPTV (m38, m3u8) on your SmartTV.First, we get the original firmware from the manufacturer’s website:https://www.philco.com...

title: Reverse Engineering Sagemcom F@ST 5302 (GVT, VIVO) [BR]
snippet: Sherlock Holmes TimeLocating the UART on the board (positions):Looking at the PCB, you will see something like this: LEDS (FRONT) CPU HEAT SINK (4 pin UART) RX TX GND 3v3 YELLOW ETHERNET PORTS (BACK)CONNECTINGUsing an USB/TTL adapter or even an Arduino with RST shorted to GND ...
